title: 12 — CMS & Events
summary: Specifies CMS articles, categories, events calendar, media library, and search behavior including fields, publishing flow, permissions, and image variants.
notes: Strong SPEC signals: field schemas, polymorphic linkable_type/id, image variant sizes, scheduler behavior contract, full-text search implementation. Some PRD-flavored scope statements (out of scope for round 1) but dominant content is implementation contract. No frontmatter or filename convention — confidence medium.
